## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Marcel Santilli's AI-assisted content creation approach and potential collaboration with Luke Tubinis at RAMP Holdings.](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company fwd.digital uses AI to create high-quality content at scale by reverse-engineering the human writing process](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Their approach involves multiple stages like research, outlining, writing, and adaptation to the client's voice and needs](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Marcel aims to provide a low-risk, high-value service that empowers clients to eventually build their own AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Luke is interested in exploring this approach to complement RAMP's existing content efforts](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Background and Approach

  - [Marcel has built successful content programs at IBM, HP, HashiCorp using contributor networks](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Realized the high costs and inefficiencies, so started using AI to streamline the process](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Their AI workflows mimic human research, outlining, writing in an adapted way for each client](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Results show their AI content outperforming human-written pieces for many keywords](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)

### Potential Collaboration with RAMP

  - [Luke previously had challenges with high-volume, low-quality content at LogRocket](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [He sees potential in Marcel's approach to produce quality content at scale for RAMP's needs](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Marcel is motivated to go "above and beyond" for RAMP after a positive past interaction](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [They plan to regroup after Marcel's meeting with RAMP's leadership](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)

### Scaling AI Content Creation

  - [Marcel aims to empower clients to build their own AI content workflows over time](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [Highlights DeepGram's instance where teams build many use cases using the technology](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Wants to make the process seamless and "native" for marketing teams](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to report back after meeting with RAMP's leadership](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [Explore potential collaboration models and terms](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [Evaluate how Marcel's approach could integrate with RAMP's existing content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/QGxwg1M6-MySGPbxNETK8Tm5TezqwUC5?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
